overall.description: A cinematic video game scene set in a medieval Gothic common room with stone arches, warm firelight, and students in robes walking around. The environment features detailed architecture with hanging plants and a large fireplace, creating a cozy atmosphere reminiscent of a wizarding school common room.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit medieval common room with Gothic stone architecture and warm firelight. A student in dark robes walks from the center toward the right while a translucent blue ghost stands near the right archway. The room features wooden furniture, hanging plants, and a large stone fireplace.

translucent blue ghost remaining near the right stone archway

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the same common room with the fireplace burning steadily. A second student enters from the left side and walks toward the center of the room, passing the wooden tables. The ghostly figure remains visible near the right archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval common room with stone fireplace and Gothic arches

agents.ego_description: stationary observing as a third student walks across the room from left to right

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from the left side toward the center-right

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the common room remains illuminated by the fireplace and wall sconces. A third student walks from the left across the room while the ghostly figure shifts position slightly near the right archway. The Gothic architecture and wooden furnishings remain prominent throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval common room where the steady glow of firelight illuminates a sequence of students crossing the space. It begins with a student in dark robes walking toward the right, passing wooden furniture and hanging plants while a translucent blue ghost lingers near a Gothic stone archway. As the camera lingers on the burning fireplace, a second student enters from the left and traverses the room toward the center, moving past heavy wooden tables. The scene then shifts focus as a third student crosses from the left, while the ghostly figure subtly adjusts its position near the archway. Finally, the shot settles on the enduring Gothic architecture and wall sconces that maintain the room's warm, atmospheric glow.
